name: mentora
description: Mentora — where seasoned professionals teach K-12. Web + mobile learning platform with OCR, low-latency video, and AI baked in.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@mentora/shared && npm run build --workspace=@mentora/api && npm run build --workspace=@mentora/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@mentora/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@mentora/web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@mentora/shared && npm run test --workspace=@mentora/web && npm run test --workspace=@mentora/api

//overrides: Pin a single React across the monorepo so hoisted UI libs (lucide-react, etc.) bind to the same React the web app renders with — prevents React 'invalid element' (#31) errors from duplicate copies.
